_note: Certifications shown on /hire. To embed a cert image, drop the file at public/certs/<image> and set `image`; otherwise the card links to `verifyUrl`. Skilljar cert images are signed-CDN and can't be auto-downloaded — save them manually from the verify page or your Anthropic Academy profile.

certs.title: Claude 101
certs.blurb: The foundations of working with Claude — what it is, how to prompt it, and its core surfaces (Projects, Artifacts, Skills, connectors).
